# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0

parameters:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Azure Function App
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 60
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for all resources
  storageAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Storage Account
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 24
  cosmosDbAccountName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Cosmos DB account
    minLength: 3
    maxLength: 44
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Server
  sqlDatabaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the SQL Database
  sqlAdminLogin:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server admin login
  sqlAdminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: SQL Server admin password
  appInsightsName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Application Insights instance

variables:
  hostingPlanName: "[concat(parameters('functionAppName'), '-plan')]"
  # Least-privilege built-in role definition IDs
  # Storage Blob Data Reader - read-only access to blob data (not full Contributor)
  storageBlobDataReaderRoleId: 2a2b9908-6ea1-4ae2-8e65-a410df84e7d1
  # Storage Queue Data Message Processor - process queue messages only
  storageQueueDataMessageProcessorRoleId: 8a0f0c08-91a1-4084-bc3d-661d67233fed
  # Storage Table Data Reader - read-only access to table data
  storageTableDataReaderRoleId: 76199698-9eea-4c19-bc75-cec21354c6b6
  # Key Vault Secrets User - read secrets only (not Officer/Admin)
  keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId: 4633458b-17de-408a-b874-0445c86b69e6
  # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Reader - read-only data plane access
  # Note: For write access, use specific Cosmos DB RBAC instead of broad roles
  cosmosDbAccountReaderRoleId: fbdf93bf-df7d-467e-a4d2-9458aa1360c8
  # Unique role assignment names
  storageBlobRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'))]"
  storageQueueRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageQueueDataMessageProcessorRoleId'))]"
  storageTableRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('storageTableDataReaderRoleId'))]"
  keyVaultRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]"
  cosmosDbRoleAssignmentName: "[guid(resourceGroup().id, parameters('functionAppName'), variables('cosmosDbAccountReaderRoleId'))]"

resources:
  # Application Insights for monitoring
  - type: Microsoft.Insights/components
    apiVersion: "2020-02-02"
    name: "[parameters('appInsightsName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: web
    properties:
      Application_Type: web
      RetentionInDays: 90
      DisableIpMasking: false
      publicNetworkAccessForIngestion: Enabled
      publicNetworkAccessForQuery: Enabled

  # Storage Account with secure defaults
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: StorageV2
    sku:
      name: Standard_LRS
    properties:
      supportsHttpsTrafficOnly: true
      minimumTlsVersion: TLS1_2
      allowBlobPublicAccess: false
      allowSharedKeyAccess: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices
      encryption:
        services:
          blob:
            enabled: true
          file:
            enabled: true
          queue:
            enabled: true
          table:
            enabled: true
        keySource: Microsoft.Storage

  # Key Vault with RBAC authorization (no access policies)
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      tenantId: "[subscription().tenantId]"
      # Use RBAC instead of access policies for better security
      enableRbacAuthorization: true
      enableSoftDelete: true
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: 90
      enablePurgeProtection: true
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: Deny
        bypass: AzureServices

  # Cosmos DB Account
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: "2023-11-15"
    name: "[parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: GlobalDocumentDB
    properties:
      databaseAccountOfferType: Standard
      consistencyPolicy:
        defaultConsistencyLevel: Session
      locations:
        - locationName: "[parameters('location')]"
          failoverPriority: 0
          isZoneRedundant: false
      disableKeyBasedMetadataWriteAccess: true
      publicNetworkAccess: Disabled
      minimalTlsVersion: Tls12
      networkAclBypass: AzureServices

  # SQL Server with AAD-only authentication
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "[parameters('sqlAdminLogin')]"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('sqlAdminPassword')]"
      minimalTlsVersion: "1.2"
      publicNetworkAccess: Disabled

  # SQL Database
  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: "2023-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
    sku:
      name: S0
      tier: Standard
    properties:
      collation: SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS
      maxSizeBytes: 2147483648
      zoneRedundant: false

  # App Service Plan (Consumption)
  - type: Microsoft.Web/serverfarms
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[variables('hostingPlanName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    sku:
      name: Y1
      tier: Dynamic
    properties:
      reserved: false

  # Function App with System-Assigned Managed Identity
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: "2023-01-01"
    name: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    kind: functionapp
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('hostingPlanName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName'))]"
    identity:
      # System-assigned identity is preferred: lifecycle tied to the resource
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      serverFarmId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/serverfarms', variables('hostingPlanName'))]"
      httpsOnly: true
      clientAffinityEnabled: false
      siteConfig:
        ftpsState: Disabled
        minTlsVersion: "1.2"
        http20Enabled: true
        # Disable remote debugging in production
        remoteDebuggingEnabled: false
        appSettings:
          - name: AzureWebJobsStorage__accountName
            # Use identity-based connection (no connection string)
            value: "[parameters('storageAccountName')]"
          - name: WEBSITE_CONTENTAZUREFILECONNECTIONSTRING
            value: "[concat('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;AccountName=', parameters('storageAccountName'), ';EndpointSuffix=', environment().suffixes.storage)]"
          - name: FUNCTIONS_EXTENSION_VERSION
            value: ~4
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: dotnet-isolated
          - name: APPINSIGHTS_INSTRUMENTATIONKEY
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName'))).InstrumentationKey]"
          - name: APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Insights/components', parameters('appInsightsName'))).ConnectionString]"
          # Reference Key Vault secrets via managed identity
          - name: CosmosDbEndpoint
            value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))).documentEndpoint]"
          - name: SqlConnectionString
            # Use AAD authentication token - no password in connection string
            value: "[concat('Server=tcp:', parameters('sqlServerName'), '.database.windows.net,1433;Database=', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'), ';Authentication=Active Directory Managed Identity;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;')]"

  # ROLE ASSIGNMENTS - Principle of Least Privilege
  # Each assignment grants only the minimum permissions needed

  # Storage Blob Data Reader - allows reading blob data only
  # If write access is needed for specific containers, create separate
  # role assignments scoped to individual containers
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageBlobRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageBlobDataReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function App read-only access to storage blobs"

  # Storage Queue Data Message Processor - process (read/delete) queue messages
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageQueueRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageQueueDataMessageProcessorRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function App queue message processing access"

  # Storage Table Data Reader - read table data
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('storageTableRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('storageTableDataReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function App read-only access to storage tables"

  # Key Vault Secrets User - read secrets only (cannot create/delete/update)
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('keyVaultRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('keyVaultSecretsUserRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function App read-only access to Key Vault secrets"

  # Cosmos DB Account Reader - read-only access at control plane
  # For data plane access, use Cosmos DB native RBAC with custom role definitions
  # scoped to specific databases/containers
  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2022-04-01"
    name: "[variables('cosmosDbRoleAssignmentName')]"
    scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[subscriptionResourceId('Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions', variables('cosmosDbAccountReaderRoleId'))]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      principalType: ServicePrincipal
      description: "Function App read-only access to Cosmos DB account metadata"

  # Cosmos DB SQL Role Assignment for data plane read/write access
  # Scoped to the database account - can be narrowed to specific databases/containers
  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleAssignments
    apiVersion: "2023-11-15"
    name: "[concat(parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '/', guid(resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName')), parameters('functionAppName')))]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName'))]"
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"
    properties:
      # Cosmos DB Built-in Data Contributor for data operations
      roleDefinitionId: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/sqlRoleDefinitions', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'), '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDbAccountName'))]"

outputs:
  functionAppName:
    type: string
    value: "[parameters('functionAppName')]"
  functionAppPrincipalId:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2023-01-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
  securityNotes:
    type: string
    value: >-
      IMPORTANT: This template follows least-privilege principles.
      1) Storage: Read-only blob/table access + queue message processing only.
         If a function needs to WRITE blobs, add Storage Blob Data Contributor
         scoped to the specific container.
      2) Key Vault: Secrets User (read-only). Cannot modify or delete secrets.
      3) Cosmos DB: Data Contributor via native RBAC. Narrow scope to specific
         databases/containers as your architecture matures.
      4) SQL: Uses AAD token authentication. Grant db_datareader/db_datawriter
         roles to the managed identity in SQL directly via T-SQL.
      5) All resources use TLS 1.2+, HTTPS only, and deny public network access.
      6) Review and remove unused role assignments regularly.
